subcodes.first_line: O friend! By the ornament of Thy musk-scented locks, which have brought upon the destitute ones in the valley of search fresh affliction from the realm of hope [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست به طراز جعد مشکینت که مسکینان وادی طلب را شوکت بلای جدید از ساحت رجا
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @symbolism
